title: Rich Tender Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A peppery and tender Algerian dish featuring lamb, perfect for kids and adults alike, with a unique twist of Oreo cream biscuits on the side, prepared using sous-vide for even cooking and incorporating ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly principles for a balanced meal.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Seal the lamb and marinade in a sous-vide bag, making sure to remove as much air as possible before sealing.
Place the sealed bag in the preheated sous-vide machine and cook for 24 hours.
After 24 hours, remove the lamb from the sous-vide machine and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with fresh parsley and accompanied by Oreo cream biscuits on the side.
Offer a side of steamed vegetables or couscous for a well-rounded meal.
Encourage kids to try a little of the spicy lamb with the sweet Oreo cream biscuits for a fun flavor combination.
